title: Extension manifest — runtime_dependencies field
description: Additive extension of the existing extension manifest schema. Declares runtime families the extension needs from the host runtime pool. Absent or empty array is valid and equivalent to 'no runtime dependencies'.

family.description: Runtime family id. Must match a family registered in the host runtime pool.

version.description: semver range; null or absent = any version.

acceleration.description: Acceptable accelerator profiles. Extension enables if any one matches an installed runtime.
